records.title: Specific constraint mechanism title
records.description: Describe the concrete mechanism: what waits, what must be verified, which handoff fails, or which capacity signal is missing before work can proceed.
evidence: Hypothesis signal: describe the observable pattern that suggests this bottleneck exists.
Operational review should confirm whether the named system captures queue, handoff, readiness, or capacity data.
affected_parties: Downstream team or customer of the process
current_process: Name the workflow intake or trigger.
Name the review, verification, scheduling, qualification, or readiness step.
Name the release, approval, commissioning, production, or service outcome.
resource_waste: Idle asset, queue aging, rework, duplicate verification, or manual chasing
records.opportunity_cost: Explain what value is delayed, trapped, duplicated, misallocated, or underused.
records.estimated_annual_impact: Use relative language only unless a real source supports a number.
records.confidence_reasoning: This record is a structured hypothesis and requires local process evidence before decision-grade claims.
validation_notes: Measure cycle time, queue age, exception rate, throughput, or rework count inside the named workflow.
Compare system records with downstream release, commissioning, production, service, or approval outcomes.
evidence_gaps: Step-level baseline for the named process
Observed frequency and owner of delay before the downstream outcome
downstream_constraints: Release, approval, commissioning, production, or service outcome
affected_systems: Named operational system, tracker, portal, repository, telemetry layer, queue, or planning system
solution_hypotheses: Instrument the process with owner, age, reason code, and exception status.
Create a bounded pilot to reduce the dominant bottleneck archetype signal.
records.archetype_reasoning: Explain why the record maps to the primary archetype using the process and downstream outcome.

sources.title: Structured hypothesis; local operational evidence required
